title: Disclosures 101 for Social Media Influencers
author: FTC staff
notes: FTC guidance on material connection disclosures, including employment and financial relationships.

title: FTC's Endorsement Guides: What People Are Asking
author: FTC staff
notes: FTC FAQ on advertiser and endorser responsibilities, clear disclosures, training, monitoring, and liability risk.

title: LinkedIn Professional Community Policies
author: LinkedIn
notes: Official LinkedIn policy covering true identity, accurate information, false or misleading content, harassment, spam, and clear disclosure for personal benefit.

title: LinkedIn Advertising Policies
author: LinkedIn
notes: Official LinkedIn ad policy covering factual support for claims, deceptive claims, partnerships, targeting, and prohibited content.

title: Intel Social Media Guidelines
author: Intel
notes: Public policy example covering employee disclosure, personal-opinion disclaimers, confidential information, code names, PR routing, and substantiated claims.

title: Social Media
author: NLRB
notes: Official NLRB page on protected concerted activity and employee social media rights.

title: SEC Says Social Media OK for Company Announcements if Investors Are Alerted
author: SEC
notes: SEC guidance on Regulation FD and social media announcements by public companies.

title: Harassment
author: EEOC
notes: Official EEOC page defining harassment and employer prevention practices.

title: Social Media Guidelines
author: Stanford University Communications
notes: Public policy example covering institutional, departmental, and individual employee social use, confidentiality, PII, third-party rights, protected concerted activity, and account security.

title: Digital Ethics Code
author: Coca-Cola HBC
notes: Public policy example covering transparency, privacy, copyrights, diversity, confidential information, authority to speak, and accountability for online actions.
